title: Form Input Binding
description: Build an input form that updates component state and displays a greeting message in real time.
checklist: Create a name property for form state
Bind the input value to the component property
Update the name property on each input event

hints.guide: Import Component and define the template with an input field
Declare a name property for the form value
Implement an input handler to update the name property
Render a greeting using Angular interpolation
